change: Added a Cloudflare Pages adapter that converts a returned deployment URL and exact 40-character source commit into the shared WebDriver BiDi verification-plan contract.

sources.status: working draft; browser implementation variability remains

verification.status: contract test committed; no workflow execution was available in this run
static_checks: adapter imports the shared frontier contract

falsification_route: Run the test under Node, then execute the generated plan with a BiDi-capable browser against the Cloudflare deployment. Reject the adapter if the returned Pages URL cannot produce the required ordered same-context transcript or if the runtime identity differs from the expected commit.
privacy: No credentials, account IDs, private chat, health data, diagnoses, or treatment claims are included.
